Off Calendar May-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motions to compel responses to request for production of documents, form and special interrogatories, and motion to deem certain matters admitted as to defendants James B. Ferrer are moot as responses have been served. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ferrer Insurance Services Inc. To Respond To Plaintiff Nora Guerrero'S Special Interrogatories (Set One) Propounded To Ferrer Insurance Service Inc.; Notice Of Lodgment In Support
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motions to compel responses to request for production of documents, form and special interrogatories, and motion to deem certain matters admitted as to defendants Ferrer Insurance Services Inc. is granted as there is no evidence that responses have been served. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $383.75 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
